name: kadmos-memory
title: Kadmos Memory
description: Query Kadmos memory — the full history of Discord messages the Kadmos bot captures. Recall what was discussed, who said what, and what is pending.
setup_instructions: Get a personal token by typing /token to the Kadmos bot in Discord (it DMs it to you). /token revoke kills it; one active token per person. The API is only reachable over the Sytex VPN.

fields.name: token
fields.label: Kadmos Token
fields.help: Type /token to the Kadmos bot in Discord — it DMs you a personal bearer token. /token revoke kills it. One active token per person.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: Kadmos Base URL
fields.help: Kadmos memory API base URL. Default is the production address, reachable on the Sytex VPN only.
